A '''life-jet''' was a small harness that was traditionally worn as a vest. Equipped with a small [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] engine, it enabled the wearer to traverse small distances within an [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmospheric]] environment. Life-jets were routinely deployed in emergency glass cases along the perimeter of [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] on the [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]].<ref name="msw57" /> They were useful should anyone ever fall off the edge of any of the suspended platforms.

[[3 ABY/Legends|Three years]] after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]] known as [[Lobot/Legends|Lobot]] was required to use a life-jet in order to save his friend, [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], who had been kicked off the city's edge by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] administrator, [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Hugo Treece]].<ref name="msw57" />
